title: Amtech R2470 12-in-1 Axe Head Multi-Function Tool
features: VERSATILE: This folding multi-tool has a mini axe head and includes plier, Phillips screwdriver, slotted screwdriver, knife, file, wire cutter, hammer, can opener, saw, hex wrench, fish scaler and hook remover
DURABLE: It is manufactured from strong, anti-rust stainless steel
PERFECT FOR CAMPING: Supplied with a handy storage pouch, it is ideal for camping, fishing, hunting and other outdoor activities
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Amtech R2470 Multi-Function Tool with Axe Head (12-in-1) Handy tool for various indoor and outdoor tasks If you are looking for a multi-function tool then this tool is for you. This handy tool can be used for various occasional uses and DIY tasks.This 12-in-1 multi-function tool includes Hex Wrench Slotted & Philips Screwdriver Fish Scaler Hook Remover Saw Can Opener Hammer Wire Cutter Mini Axe File Knife Plier
